---
name: Bug report
about: Report any bugs or unexpected behavior
title: 'bug: '
labels: bug
type: 'Bug'
assignees: ''

---

### Problem
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Include any relevant context, screenshots, logs, or links that help explain the problem.

### Impact
Indicate how significant you believe the impact of the bug is.

### To reproduce
If you can reproduce the behavior, steps to reproduce:
- Platform details (OS, architecture): '...'
- Branch/commit used: '...'
- Relevant log lines: '...'
- Nim/Nimble version: '...'

### Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.
